Sequence - Klasse in me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.embedding
A container class for a transformer internal Embedding-Sequence

Sequence(List<Double>, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.embedding.Sequence
Constructs a Sequence from a raw-input-data list by tokenizing it and positional-encode each token.
